instructions.summary: Create dev.to and Hashnode accounts to syndicate 13 guides as indexed articles on DR 80-90 domains.
instructions.detail: Dev.to (DR 90) and Hashnode (DR 80) both support canonical URLs, meaning cross-posted articles boost SEO without duplicate content penalties. Each of the 13 VerdeDesk guides can be published as an article with canonical_url pointing back to VerdeDesk. These platforms index in Google within hours — this is the fastest path to Google visibility while GSC remains pending. Both platforms have free accounts with instant registration.
instructions.exact_action:
Two accounts, ~5 minutes total:

1. DEV.TO (3 min):
   - Go to dev.to and sign up with carlos.gaspar2011@gmail.com
   - Go to Settings > Extensions > Publishing from RSS — paste: https://verdedesk.vercel.app/feed.xml
   - OR go to Settings > Extensions > DEV Community API Keys — generate a key
   - Add to secrets: echo 'export DEVTO_API_KEY="..."' >> ~/.founder-secrets

2. HASHNODE (2 min):
   - Go to hashnode.com and sign up with carlos.gaspar2011@gmail.com
   - Create a publication (e.g., 'VerdeDesk Blog')
   - Go to Developer settings, create a Personal Access Token
   - Add to secrets: echo 'export HASHNODE_TOKEN="..."' >> ~/.founder-secrets
instructions.unblocks: Agent can immediately publish all 13 guides as syndicated articles on two DR 80-90 domains. Each article will have canonical URLs back to VerdeDesk, generating indexed backlinks and direct referral traffic. This is the highest-ROI action available right now.
